default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the first "old vs. new" marketing teardown topic.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Teardown Topic:** The first teardown will compare **Figma vs. Canva**, chosen for its clear "old vs. new" dynamic and strong SEO/AEO relevance to the community.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The teardown will use a scorecard format to enable rapid, templated analysis. The core content will be free, with a paid subscriber-only section detailing actionable "what we would do differently" strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Ryan's Transition:** Ryan is leaving his full-time role to focus on his content business, which will combine client work (e.g., for Quo) with building scalable, productized offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Webinar Learnings:** Recent webinars showed high demand (Ryan's: 5k signups/1k attendees; Jason's: 450 attendees) but highlighted a need for simpler, more accessible content to engage a mass-market audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Monetization

  - [**Goal:** Build a scalable content business that avoids the time-for-money trap of a traditional agency.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Proposed Content Funnel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
    1.  [**Free:** Scorecard teardowns to attract a broad audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
    2.  [**Paid:** Subscriber-only section with actionable "what we would do differently" strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
    3.  [**Deep Dives:** In-depth case studies on exceptional strategies to provide high-value content.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Ryan's New Role:** A 60/40 split between client work (e.g., SEO fix, content engineering for Quo) and personal content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Webinar Learnings

  - [**Ryan's Zapier Webinar:**](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [**Performance:** 5,000 signups, 1,000 live attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [**Key Lesson:** Content was too complex (e.g., a 30-step Zap). Future webinars will use a "low effort, high impact" matrix to show simpler, more accessible builds.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [**Jason's Lovable Webinar:**](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Performance:** 450 live attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Some attendees found the storytelling-heavy format less practical than usual.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### Teardown Topic Selection

  - [**Selection Criteria:** The topic must have a clear "old vs. new" dynamic and strong SEO/AEO relevance to the community.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Candidates Considered:**](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Zoom vs. Fireflies/Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [MailChimp vs. Instantly](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Asana vs. Motion](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
      - [Google Slides vs. Gamma](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [**Decision:** **Figma vs. Canva**. This pair was chosen because it represents two distinct approaches to design tools and avoids the complexity of AI-native tools like Gamma for a first teardown.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ryan:** Finalize the structure and content pairs for the first teardown scorecard by the end of the weekend.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [**Jason:** Review Ryan's draft and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Auz1rm8_nqkrxityMfYj6TFB87ryqzv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

action_items.description: Find vendor for desk focus timers (swag)
Finalize 3 teardown pairs; send to Jason for review
